texto: Desperately and immediately, he wanted them to be happy. May they be deeply in love, forever and ever, ex cetera, amen. At least if it was true love then the choking feeling in Axton's throat wouldn't be in vain. He could lose out to a grand and staggering love. His pain would be worth it if their love was the kind that time itself would stand still for, the type that made angels weep.
explicacao: Citação de S.P. Wayne sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Desperately and immediately, he wanted them to be happy. May they be deeply in love, forever and …” articula amor, heartache, love em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como love.
